transcript: Speaker A (Human): Axar jump catch on boundary and throw the ball to Dubey. Speaker B (AI): नहीं, इसको बोलेंगे 'Axar caught the ball while running at full speed and tossed it to Shivam Dube.' [No, we will say 'Axar caught the ball while running at full speed and tossed it to Shivam Dube.'] Speaker A: मुझे भी ऐसी इंग्लिश सीखनी है, लेकिन मेरे पास ज्यादा पैसे और टाइम नहीं है। [I also want to learn English like this, but I don't have much money or time.] Speaker B: MySivi ट्राई करो। रोज़ 10-15 मिनट मेरे साथ इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करो और आप एक महीने में अच्छी इंग्लिश बोलने लगोगे। यह साधारण क्लासेस से 7 गुना सस्ती भी है। सिर्फ ₹1 में शुरू कर सकते हो। [Try MySivi. Practice English with me for 10-15 minutes daily and you'll start speaking good English in a month. It's also 7 times cheaper than regular classes. You can start for just ₹1.] Speaker A: इसमें टीचर कौन होगा? [Who will be the teacher in this?] Speaker B: मेरे जैसे AI टीचर्स। स्टेप-बाय-स्टेप इंग्लिश स्पीकिंग सिखाएंगे। 50 लाख से ज्यादा यूज़र्स MySivi में प्रैक्टिस करते हैं। [AI teachers like me. They will teach step-by-step English speaking. More than 50 lakh users practice on MySivi.] Voiceover: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Describe the Scene in English; Axar caught the ball while running at full speed and tossed it to Shivam Dubey; MySivi; 10-15 Minutes; 7x Cheaper; Sirf 1 Rupaye; 50L Users; MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A split-screen ad featuring an AI avatar correcting a human's English description of a cricket play. The avatar promotes the MySivi app as an affordable, quick daily practice tool with AI teachers. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app.
